name: Revel Systems iPad POS API
what_it_does: Revel Systems REST API for iPad-native POS platform for restaurants and retail. Enables AI agents to manage product and menu management, handle order and transaction data, access customer and loyalty data, retrieve inventory and stock management, manage employee timekeeping and payroll exports, handle reporting and sales analytics, access multi-location management and franchise data, retrieve payment processing and settlement data, and integrate POS data with accounting, loyalty, and delivery platforms.
use_cases: Accessing transaction and order data from restaurant analytics automation agents
Managing menu and product updates from restaurant operations agents
Retrieving sales performance and location analytics from multi-location management agents
Integrating POS data with loyalty and accounting from restaurant technology agents
not_for: Large enterprise POS without iPad-native and SMB-to-mid-market restaurant focus
Hospitality without restaurant and quick-service POS workflow requirements
High-volume enterprise retail without restaurant-specific features
best_when: A restaurant chain, quick-service brand, or food retail operator using Revel Systems wants AI agents to automate menu management, order analytics, inventory tracking, sales reporting, and POS integration with loyalty and accounting platforms.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: POS transaction data includes sensitive payment card data (PCI-DSS). Automated menu pricing changes affect revenue. Multi-location franchise data may be shared across franchise owner and corporate contexts — verify data access permissions.

auth.notes: Revel Systems uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Account and establishment-level credentials. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for order and inventory events. Marketplace integrations for loyalty and delivery.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — POS subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-terminal monthly pricing; annual hardware and software bundles
pricing.notes: San Francisco, California. Founded 2010. Pioneer iPad POS platform. Acquired by Francisco Partners (private equity) 2021. 20,000+ businesses globally. Strong quick-service restaurant and food retail market. iPad-native architecture. Competes with Toast and Square for iPad POS. Strong international presence.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: POS payment data — PCI-DSS scope; card data never touches automation layer
No public MCP server — API key and OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
Multi-establishment data access — franchise vs corporate access controls must be respected
Menu automation across multiple locations requires careful synchronization — partial updates cause inconsistencies
Inventory management through POS is approximate — physical counts needed for accuracy
Francisco Partners acquisition — platform strategy may evolve; verify current API roadmap
agent_readiness.security_notes: POS transaction and payment data. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR. API key and OAuth2. Multi-region. PCI tokenization required.

security_score_components.security_notes: POS payment data. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR. API key and OAuth2. Multi-region. iPad-native platform.
